text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Get this! I thought of a new hero monologue! You
wanna give it a listen?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ah, great! Lay it on me!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I am the heart of discipline in a cruel world! To my
friends I am justice, to my enemies—a monster!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Those who violate the rules will be punished! I will
crush their evil deeds to dust!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
So, what do you think? I wanted something
intimidating enough to stop people in their
tracks.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! Not bad! All that oomph in your words really hits the mark!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
For real?! This is awesome! Okay, I'm gonna put it
to good use starting tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, you're probably gonna fire people
up more than stop 'em cold...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: But you're Bamboo—people should adore ya. Think I'll tag along while you work.
